items.docs: Submit a plain-text description of one or more foods and receive a full nutrient breakdown for each detected food, including calories, macros, micronutrients, serving sizes, and photos.
Submit a plain-text description of physical activity and receive an estimate of calories burned, personalized by the user's gender, weight, height, and age.

params.name: query
params.description: The food search phrase to match against common and branded foods.

params.name: branded
params.description: Whether to include branded foods in the results.

params.name: common
params.description: Whether to include common foods in the results.

params.name: detailed
params.description: Whether to return full nutrient detail for each result.

params.name: branded_type
params.description: Filter branded results by type (1 for restaurant, 2 for grocery/CPG).

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale code used to localize results (e.g. en_US).

items.docs: Typeahead search that returns matched common foods and branded foods for a partial or complete query string. Ideal for building food autocomplete experiences.

params.name: nix_item_id
params.description: The Nutritionix item identifier for a branded or restaurant item.

params.name: upc
params.description: The UPC barcode of a branded grocery item.

params.name: claims
params.description: Whether to include marketing/regulatory claims in the response.

params.name: allergens
params.description: Whether to include allergen information in the response.

items.docs: Retrieve full nutrition detail for a branded or restaurant menu item by its Nutritionix item identifier or UPC barcode.

params.name: id
params.description: The item identifier or resource identifier to look up.

params.name: upc
params.description: The UPC barcode of a branded grocery item.

items.docs: Retrieve a single item by its item identifier, resource identifier, or UPC. This is the legacy item-lookup endpoint; new integrations should prefer /search/item.

params.name: type
params.description: Filter by brand type (1 for restaurant, 2 for grocery/CPG).

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of brands to return.

items.docs: Search the database of food and restaurant brands by name, optionally filtering by brand type (restaurant or grocery/CPG).
